data.content: Implementation complete. Branch: codex/7770-overview-tags. Commit: 7465239565c37d13f3e1ac719b9d508a744c45df. Pushed to origin/codex/7770-overview-tags. Changes: overview tiles render cleaned user-visible beat tags; overview has tag and setlist multi-select filters; setlist options are loaded from plan summaries per repo and labelled with plan id plus the first 40 characters of the setlist objective/summary; combined filtering is OR within each category and AND across tag/setlist categories. Validation passed: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
